info.title: Glibl
info.description:
API for Glibl, digitize all business cards, yours and others.
Welcome to the Global API documentation. Some routes require OAuth 2.0 authentication.

**Today we do not allow you to create a new application yourself.**

In order to use the API, please contact us at [contact@glibl.fr](mailto:contact@glibl.fr) to generate a new third-party application authorized to consume API resources. 
We will review your request and provide you with a `CLIENT_ID` and a `SECRET_ID`.

get.description: Check if user is fully connected to the API.
Get all collaborator's contact. Namely, your own contacts are integrated. **Team Manager licence is required.**

parameters.name: Glibl-App-Area
parameters.description: The field used to limit area

parameters.name: X-LICENCE-KEY
parameters.description: The field used to get the licence

card_front.description: Link to the front of the business card

collaborator_firstname.description: First name of the employee attached to this contact

collaborator_lastname.description: Last name of the employee attached to this contact

collaborator_email.description: Email of the employee attached to this contact

get.summary: Returns the number of contact creations in total and for the current month.
get.description: This is the total number of contacts acquired for the employee. **Team Manager licence is required.**

parameters.name: Glibl-App-Area
parameters.description: The field used to limit area

parameters.name: X-LICENCE-KEY
parameters.description: The field used to get the licence

parameters.name: all_team
parameters.description: Recovery of statistics for the individual employee or their entire team. Default : true (entire team)

lastMonth.description: Total number of contacts acquired on last month

get.summary: Returns the team's monthly contact creation statistics.
get.description: The statistics are calculated between n* years (or a single 01/2024 -> 12/2024). The start and end year are passed as query parameter [start: string, end: string]. **Team Manager licence is required.**

parameters.name: Glibl-App-Area
parameters.description: The field used to limit area

parameters.name: X-LICENCE-KEY
parameters.description: The field used to get the licence

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start year. By default it is the current year

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End year. By default it is the current year

parameters.name: all_team
parameters.description: Recovery of statistics for the individual employee or their entire team. Default : true (entire team)

get.summary: Returns a user's or team's card sharing statistics.
get.description:
Statistics are calculated between 12 months of the current year by default.
        Warning: limit the data reported over 3 years for performance reasons. **Team Manager licence is required.**

parameters.name: Glibl-App-Area
parameters.description: The field used to limit area

parameters.name: X-LICENCE-KEY
parameters.description: The field used to get the licence

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start date. By default it is the current date

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End date. By default it is the current date

parameters.name: all_team
parameters.description: Recovery of statistics for the individual employee or their entire team. Default : true (entire team)

get.summary: Returns a user's or team's card sharing totals.
get.description: The values returned are the overall totals and for the current month. **Team Manager licence is required.**

parameters.name: Glibl-App-Area
parameters.description: The field used to limit area

parameters.name: X-LICENCE-KEY
parameters.description: The field used to get the licence

parameters.name: all_team
parameters.description: Recovery of statistics for the individual employee or their entire team. Default : true (entire team)

lastMonth.description: Total card sharing on last month

get.summary: Returns a user's or team's card visits statistics.
get.description:
Statistics are calculated between 12 months of the current year by default.
        Warning: limit the data reported over 3 years for performance reasons. **Team Manager licence is required.**

parameters.name: Glibl-App-Area
parameters.description: The field used to limit area

parameters.name: X-LICENCE-KEY
parameters.description: The field used to get the licence

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start date. By default it is the current date

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End date. By default it is the current date

parameters.name: all_team
parameters.description: Recovery of statistics for the individual employee or their entire team. Default : true (entire team)

get.summary:
Retourne toutes les statistiques de l'équipe d'un manager
Seul les compteurs sont envoyés, pas les données complétes.
get.description:
Ce sont les mêmes données que pour le rapport hebdomadaire, mais pour une période donnée.
Si aucune date founie, on prend l'ensemble des données (sauf pour la moyenne de contact par mois qui est calculée
sur l'année en cours ou l'année de la période donnée).

options.summary:
Retourne toutes les statistiques de l'équipe d'un manager
Seul les compteurs sont envoyés, pas les données complétes.
options.description:
Ce sont les mêmes données que pour le rapport hebdomadaire, mais pour une période donnée.
Si aucune date founie, on prend l'ensemble des données (sauf pour la moyenne de contact par mois qui est calculée
sur l'année en cours ou l'année de la période donnée).

post.description: Add a new contact / card to your contact list. This new contact is a Glibl card or a scanned card.

contact_id.description: ID of a new contact added

patch.description: Update a contact / card to your favorite.

requestBody.description: Toggle a contact / card to favorite

message.example: Business card successfully added to your favorites.

get.description: Get paginated list of your contact.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Display mode card or list. Default mode : list.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting by. Default sorting : lastname.

parameters.name: sens
parameters.description: Sort order by ASC or DESC. Default sort order : asc.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Use this field to search a contact.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number.

get.description: Get a specific release note of the team-manager

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Version of the release note

createdAt.description: Creation date of the release note

get.description: Get user credentials like first name and last name.

scopes.read_email: Grants read-only access to basic information about your account like email, firstname, lastname, profil ID, roles and logo filename.
scopes.read_contact: Grants read-only access to the contact list and detail.
scopes.write_contact: Grants read/write access to the contact list and detail. Allow you to favorite a contact or delete a contact.
scopes.read_profil: Grants read-only access to profile data.
scopes.write_profil: Grants read/write access to profile data. Edit profile information or change the card template.
scopes.admin_tm_contact: Full access to the contact list and collaborators' contact. Allow the addition and deletion of a contact or the change of collaborator.
scopes.read_tm_contact: Grants read-only access to the contact list and collaborators' contact details.
scopes.write_tm_contact: Grants read/write access to the contact list and collaborators' contact details. Allow the addition of a contact or the change of collaborator.
scopes.read_tm_collaborator: Grants read-only access to the list and details of collaborators.
scopes.write_tm_collaborator: Grants read/write access to the list and the details of collaborators.
scopes.admin_tm_enrollment: Full access to the enrollments. Allow the deletion and archiving of an enrollment.
scopes.read_tm_enrollment: Grants read-only access to the list and details of enrollments.
scopes.write_tm_enrollment: Grants read/write access to the list and details of enrollments. Allow the archiving of an enrollment.

tags.name: Default
tags.description: Email information and other basic credentials informations.
